taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, Python
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Generative AI:1.0, Large Language Models:1.0, Retrieval-Augmented Generation:0.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, or related technical field, 3+ years of experience in Machine Learning/AI engineering, Strong programming skills in Python and experience with ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow), Practical experience with LLM deployments and fine-tuning, Experience with vector databases and embedding models, Familiarity with modern AI/ML infrastructure and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure), Strong understanding of RAG architectures and implementation
preferred_quals: Experience with popular LLM frameworks (Langchain, LlamaIndex, Transformers), Knowledge of prompt engineering and chain-of-thought techniques, Experience with containerization and microservices architecture, Background in Reinforcement Learning, Contributions to open-source AI projects, Experience with ML ops and model deployment pipelines
core_responsibilities: Design and implement RAG-based solutions to enhance LLM capabilities with external knowledge sources, Develop and optimize LLM fine-tuning strategies for specific use cases and domain adaptation, Create robust evaluation frameworks for measuring and improving model performance, Build and maintain agentic workflows for autonomous AI systems, Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities and implement AI solutions
job_summary: Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. is seeking an experienced Machine Learning Engineer specializing in Generative AI to join their core AI team. The role involves designing, developing, and deploying cutting-edge generative AI solutions, focusing on Large Language Models and Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
